subcodes.first_line: O Ghulám-'Alí! The fragrance of thy love hath reached the Most Holy Court. We have hearkened unto thy call and beheld thy turning unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلامعلی عرف محبتت بساحت اقدس رسید ندایت را شنیدیم و اقبالت را بافق اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @knowledge; recognition of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
